title: Connect a Frontend to a Backend Using Services
text:
This task shows how to create a
frontend
and a
backend
microservice. The backend
microservice is a hello greeter. The frontend exposes the backend using nginx and a
Kubernetes
Service
object.

Create and run a sample
hello
backend microservice using a
Deployment
object.
Use a Service object to send traffic to the backend microservice's multiple replicas.
Create and run a
nginx
frontend microservice, also using a Deployment object.
Configure the frontend microservice to send traffic to the backend microservice.
Use a Service object of
type=LoadBalancer
to expose the frontend microservice
outside the cluster.
